name: Credentials in Registry - Autologon and VNC Password Queries
description: Detects registry queries for stored credentials including Autologon passwords, VNC passwords, PuTTY proxy credentials, and Seatbelt automated scanning.
query: process where event.type == "start" and ((process.name == "reg.exe" and process.args : "query" and process.args : ("*Winlogon*", "*TightVNC*", "*RealVNC*", "*WinVNC*", "*SimonTatham*", "*PuTTY*")) or process.args : "*Seatbelt*")
